title: sabbatia corymbosa
intro: Sabbatia corymbosa, also known as Rosy Hibiscus or Rosin Rose, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Sabbatia corymbosa include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a medical professional.
